report.summary: Day 72 standup v5: Delta since v4 — build-v4 shipped 2 more guides (Lido V3 stVaults + Institutional Crypto Adoption 2026). EOD-v4 flagged TS regression 46→142 errors from new pages. BTC $70,335-$71,043 (+3-4%), ETH $2,133-$2,328 (+3-10%), F&G still 11 Extreme Fear. BTC dominance jumped to 58.5-59% (was 56.4%). Stablecoins $311B (slight pullback from $316B). Industry layoffs accelerating: Algorand 25%, Crypto.com 12%, Gemini 30. Git locks Day 10 — 799 files, ~170+ page deploy gap. 25 agent runs today ($1,581). P0 unchanged: clear git locks + deploy.

sections.title: Analytics
items: DELTA SINCE STANDUP v4: Build-v4 shipped Lido V3 stVaults Guide (~3,100 words, modular staking, DeFi yield loops, competitor table) + Institutional Crypto Adoption Guide (~2,800 words, BlackRock BUIDL, SEC-CFTC framework, AI convergence). EOD-v4 flagged TS error regression: 46→142 (94 new errors from lido-v3 page, likely JSX escaping). Community-v4 drafted posts #122-124 (CLARITY Act yield deal, $13.5B options expiry, F&G Day 51) + 3 SVG cards + calendar v31.

MARKET UPDATE (fresh): BTC ~$70,335-$71,043 (+3-4% 24h, holding above $70K). ETH ~$2,133-$2,328 (+3-10% across exchanges, volatile spread). F&G Index: 11 (Extreme Fear — streak continues, up 3 pts from previous reading). Total market cap: $2.41-$2.5T. BTC dominance: 58.5-59.07% (UP from 56.42% — significant jump, flight to BTC quality).

STABLECOINS UPDATE: $311B market cap (DOWN from $316B — $5B pullback). USDT: $176B (56-60% share). USDC: $74B (25% share). Top 5 still dominate. CLARITY Act stablecoin yield 99% resolved — Tillis-Alsobrooks deal reached.

INDUSTRY LAYOFFS: Algorand (-25%), Crypto.com (-12%), OP Labs (-20 headcount), Gemini (up to -30). Bear market hiring contraction deepening despite BTC recovery. Counter-cyclical opportunity for content platforms with low headcount.
QUEUE STATUS: PUBLISH_QUEUE empty (drained in v1). 67+ ecosystem pages in unpublished inventory.

LOCAL METRICS: 1,160 page.tsx files (+2 from v4). 517 published entries (499 unique, +2/+3 from v4). Deploy gap: ~170+ pages (last commit e999560, Mar 17). 799 uncommitted files. TS errors: 142 (up from 46, regression from new pages).

sections.title: Project Manager
items: DONE SINCE v4: Build-v4 shipped Lido V3 stVaults + Institutional Crypto Adoption guides. EOD-v4 completed full QA cycle — flagged TS regression (142 errors). Community-v4 drafted 3 new social posts + 3 SVG cards + newsletter addendum v4 + calendar v31. Design-v4 and Publish-v4 completed their cycles.

PIPELINE HEALTH: PUBLISH_QUEUE empty. 517 entries in PUBLISHED_PAGES (499 unique). 1,160 page.tsx files. Today's total across 4 full cycles + 5 standups: 8 guides, 5 ecosystem pages, 7+ OG images, 15 social posts, 11 SVG cards, 4 newsletters, 14+ UX fixes, 1 interactive calculator.
TOTAL INVENTORY: 499 unique published slugs. ~338 live in production (stale Mar 17 commit). Deploy gap: ~170+ pages (34% unreachable).

BLOCKER [P0 — DAY 10]: Git locks (.git/HEAD.lock + .git/index.lock) confirmed still present. 799 uncommitted files. ALL content since Mar 17 is local-only. Jefe action required: rm .git/index.lock .git/HEAD.lock → git add . → git commit → git push.
BLOCKER [P1]: 103+ published slugs missing page.tsx (Day 1 pillars: wallets, taxes, investing, learn fundamentals).

REGRESSION [P1]: TS errors tripled 46→142 across 5 files. New pages (lido-v3-stvaults, institutional-crypto) contributing 96 new errors. JSX escaping pattern — batch-fixable but growing error surface.
CARRY-OVER [P1]: Rate limiter coverage 0/6 core API routes.
CARRY-OVER [P2]: 18 duplicate slugs in published-pages.ts (517 entries, 499 unique).
TODAY'S AGENT RUNS: standup×4→5, build×4, design×4, community×4, publish×4, eod×4 = 24 + this standup = 25 total.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — CLEAR GIT LOCKS + DEPLOY (DAY 10 — CRITICAL): Deploy gap at ~170+ pages. BTC dominance surging to 59% signals institutional rotation — our institutional adoption guide and exchange reviews need to be live NOW. Every hour compounds lost organic traffic. SEC commodity classification + CLARITY Act deal = massive tailwind for crypto content SEO. One manual intervention unlocks 50%+ content increase.

PRIORITY 2 — FIX TS REGRESSION BEFORE DEPLOY: 142 errors (up from 46) must be addressed before next deploy attempt. ignoreBuildErrors:true masks these but they represent growing tech debt. Next build cycle should batch-fix JSX escaping across all 5 affected files before any new content.

PRIORITY 3 — TAX PAGES (APRIL 15 = 21 DAYS): 8 tax-related published slugs have no page.tsx. Tax season search volume peaks in next 2 weeks. This is a hard deadline — after April 15, traffic drops 90%. Scaffold tax pages NOW.

STRATEGIC NOTE: BTC dominance jump from 56.4% to 59% signals risk-off within crypto — capital flowing from alts to BTC. Combined with industry layoffs (Algorand, Crypto.com, Gemini), the market is pricing in a flight-to-quality. Yet stablecoins still $311B and institutional adoption accelerating (BlackRock BUIDL $2.85B, tokenized RWA $35.6B). This divergence suggests smart money is positioning while retail panics. Our DCA calculator, fear-greed content, and institutional guides are exactly what people search during these regimes. Agent spend today: $1,581 across 25 runs. Deploy unlocks ~$8K+ of accumulated content value.
